holdings.infoBox: JCHI is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tencent Holdings stock at 11.43%, Alibaba Group Holding at 7.21%, Ping An Insurance (Group) Company of China at 4.28%, China Merchants Bank at 4.24%, and Contemporary Amperex Technology at 3.95%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Active China ETF Active China ETF (JCHI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to hold a narrow portfolio of Chinese equities and equity-related securities that are fundamentally assessed for sustainable growth and disciplined capital management. The fund also considers ESG factors during the investment process JCHI was launched on Mar 15, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
